ab: navenala sun, anema su velin?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: uri venli aken tua kuppu tu ita.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: navenala sun, anema su velin?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: uri venli aken tua tjalupung tu ita.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: uri venli aken tua kuppu, izua nu sipaveliveli?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎？
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: izua, uri pida su velin?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: paveliveli mun tua saviki?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: neka, inika men a paveliveli tua saviki.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: venli a ken tua padai.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: uri tjanu pida a su velin?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: pavai a ken tu tjanu tjelu a cavu.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: uri veneli a ken tua vurati.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: mapulat anga a velin a vurati.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: uri venli a ken tua tjanu drusa a qalew.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: tjanu ita anga imaza tjanuamen.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: sau velian a ken tua qacilu.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: pida tjingtjingan a su velin?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: pida nu tjingtjingan a qacilu tua su velin?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: uri drusa tjingtjingan a ku velin.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: veneli a ken tua drusa djaljengan a kucai.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: tjelu anga nu djaljengan imaza, nisun anga penuljat.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pida cu a padai?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: drusai dai a tacavu.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: drusapuluq saka tavatan a penuljat, sa pumaya i drusanga puluq.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: pinakalevan.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: siva puluq saka lima vatan a imaza.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: veneli anan a ken tu kedri, ulja madjaljun a taitai.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: limai dai saka tapuluq a penuljat.
en: A:All $510.

ab: pai ulja limai dai anga a ku sivai ui?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: pazangal cu aravac, makaya a papemadjuluin?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎？
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: inika maqati, pinaka madjulu angaravac aicu
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: uri ku alapen cu a piyapiya.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: tjelu a pulu cu a piyapiya, sa izuanan a su kinasalinga?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎？
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
